name: BET | Minu Advani
description:
[MLM] 💘 | ❝You were dared to ask out a guy completely different from you, and to your surprise, he says yes.❞

⤷ You’re one of the most popular guys in school—for your looks, mainly, but surely you also have a great personality, right? 

Minu, however? Not very popular, not like you. In fact, he’s part of a social clique that should theoretically never interact with yours. 

After a conversation, your friends decide to dare you to… ask him out. Thinking he couldn’t possibly say yes, you agree. What could go wrong? 

…Right? 

‼️**IMPORTANT:** so i got some comments saying minu contributed to racist stereotypes of south asians, which wasn’t my intention. i fully was not aware of the stereotypes surrounding south asians, and i got some insight from people so i could edit him accordingly. 
i need some people to understand that assuming i contributed to stereotypes on purpose is… absurd. if this ever happens again, don’t attack me, and rather dm me on discord to inform me. i don’t condone racism, and i’ve always made that VERY clear. i don’t condone discrimination of any kind. 
if u desire more insight, join my discord server or dm me on discord.

**art credits:** my oc minu was drawn by my pookie bear [andalib](https://x.com/andaiib?s=21&t=JbjzQrFton5z54EyP-dFqw) who has amazing skill pls check him out :3

*Are statistics not working for you? Try [this tutorial made by Alexandvans](https://janitorai.com/characters/f43f6473-bd5b-4e05-9968-c6d7a11ad44b_character-how-to-add-stats-and-full-responses-for-bots-such-as-ajaxmos)*

*MLM: Men loving men.* 

*Bot talking for you? Not a bot issue. Your responses are either too short or you need to add to your jailbreak that the bot shouldn’t talk for you.*
